DoR gate PASS. Story status: US-035 READY, US-037 READY (seq after US-035), US-036 SPIKE (geometry assumed-measure -> /prototype before its Phase-1 LLR derivation). Adopted defaults: range.start anchoring, low-sample(<64B) tagged not dropped, per-variant report section, own band colour map (grey/green/yellow/red, not sev-*). Next: run US-036 /prototype measurement to complete its DoR, then Phase 1 derives all three.

US-036 modal geometry MEASURED under Pilot (real LegendScreen .modal-dialog, textual 8.2.8): usable content width = 48 cols @80x24 / 76 cols @120x30 (70%*W - border 2 - padding 4; scrollbar overlays). C-13 verdict: FITS both regimes (30-col jump row -> 18-col margin @80), no column-span/fallback rung. US-036 flipped SPIKE->READY; no separate /prototype step needed. Incidental: editable install .pth resolves s19_app to a DIFFERENT worktree (lucid-margulis) -> Phase-3 standalone scripts need sys.path.insert; in-repo pytest from this worktree root is fine.
